text.arabic: لا بأْسَ طَهـورٌ إِنْ شـاءَ الله
text.transliteration: Lā ba'sa ṭahūrun in shā Allāh.

translations.en: Do not worry, it will be a purification (for you), Allah willing.

text.arabic:
أَسْـأَلُ اللهَ العَـظيـم، رَبَّ العَـرْشِ العَـظيـم أَنْ يَشْفـيك .
(سبع مرات)

translations.en:
I ask Almighty Allah, Lord of the Magnificent Throne, to make you well.
(Recite seven times in Arabic .)

items.reference:
At-Tirmidhi, Abu Dawud. See also Al-Albani, Sahih At-Tirmidhi 2/210 and
Sahihul-Jami' As-Saghir 5/180.
